data.title: Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement
data.summary: "An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries," wrote President Trump late Saturday afternoon.
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin's price increased following President Trump's announcement of a peace agreement with Iran.

data.title: Bitcoin is ready to beat stocks and bonds again after underperformance against Wall Street
data.summary: Former Credit Suisse global head of portfolio and Risk Dimensions CIO Mark Connors says bitcoin has broken out of its longest stretch of underperformance in history and is ready to beat stocks, bonds, and gold as inflation stubbornly sticks around.
data.ai_summary: A former Credit Suisse executive predicts Bitcoin is poised to outperform stocks and bonds after a period of underperformance.

data.title: Bitcoin tanks to $74,300 as spot ETFs bleed $2.26 billion in two weeks
data.summary: U.S.-listed spot bitcoin exchange-traded funds have seen more than $2.26 billion in outflows over the past two weeks.
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin's price dropped to $74,300 due to U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs experiencing $2.26 billion in outflows over two weeks.

data.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
data.summary: Chun Wang, the first Mission Commander for SpaceX’s first commercial spaceflight to Mars, is crucial for the future transport of millions of tons of cargo and a million citizens to the Red Planet.
data.ai_summary: Chun Wang, founder of F2Pool and controller of 11% of Bitcoin's hashrate, will lead SpaceX's first commercial mission to Mars.

data.title: Live markets: Bitcoin heads lower late Friday as Warsh takes over at Fed
data.summary: Kevin Warsh was sworn in as Fed chairman in a White House ceremony early Friday afternoon.
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin's price declined following Kevin Warsh being sworn in as the new Fed chairman.

data.title: Trump Media moved but 'did not sell' $205 million in bitcoin amid rising losses on crypto bets
data.summary: DJT’s bitcoin strategy remains under pressure as the company sits on hundreds of millions in unrealized crypto losses and widening quarterly deficits.
data.ai_summary: Trump Media moved $205 million in Bitcoin but did not sell it, despite facing increasing unrealized losses on its crypto investments.

data.title: Bitcoin left behind in the geopolitical melee
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin is not performing well or acting as a safe haven amidst current geopolitical turmoil.

data.title: Crypto majors stuck in tight range as altcoin rotation picks up steam
data.summary: Bitcoin holds between $76,000 and $78,000 while AI tokens and HYPE surge; derivatives signal calm conditions with volatility selling dominating options markets.
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin is trading within a narrow range between $76,000 and $78,000, while altcoins are seeing increased activity.

data.title: Bitcoin implied volatility drops to 7 month low despite macro risks
data.summary: BTC's implied volatility is a picture of calm even as financial headlines warn of macro risks.
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin's implied volatility has reached a seven-month low, indicating market calm despite ongoing macro risks.

data.title: A massive $1 trillion hidden market is waiting to be unlocked in bitcoin, says new report
data.summary: Ledn forecasts the bitcoin-backed lending market could grow to $1 trillion within a decade as new research highlights strong borrower demand.
data.ai_summary: A new report by Ledn forecasts the Bitcoin-backed lending market could grow to $1 trillion within a decade, driven by strong borrower demand.

data.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nadaq. Here's what it means for you.
data.summary: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management
data.ai_summary: Nasdaq plans to offer Bitcoin options, pending CFTC approval, aiming to democratize crypto risk management.

data.title: Bitcoin trades above $77,000 as oil's 5% slide pushes Asian equities higher
data.summary: Oil’s 5% drop on potential Strait of Hormuz reopening boosted Asian equities and supported crypto sentiment.
data.ai_summary: Bitcoin traded above $77,000, supported by positive crypto sentiment following a 5% drop in oil prices that boosted Asian equities.

data.title: HYPE funds attract millions as investors dump bitcoin and ether ETFs
data.summary: Investors turn to HYPE and XRP funds while dumping bitcoin and ether ETFs.
data.ai_summary: Investors are dumping Bitcoin and Ether ETFs, shifting millions into HYPE and XRP funds instead.
